sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cohen & Steers (CNS) Reports Decrease in Assets Under Management
feed.summary: Cohen & Steers (CNS) reported a $1.4 billion decrease in assets under management (AUM) in December 2025, primarily due to market depreciation, totaling $90.5 billion. Despite this, the firm maintains strong financial health with robust operating margins and a high Altman Z-Score. Valuation metrics suggest potential undervaluation, with the stock trading near historical lows.

feed.title: Citigroup Umumkan Dividen Kuartalan Sebesar $0,60 per Saham
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. mengumumkan dividen kuartalan sebesar $0,60 per saham biasa, dibayarkan pada 27 Februari 2026, kepada pemegang saham yang tercatat per 2 Februari 2026. Ini menghasilkan dividen tahunan sebesar $2,40 per saham dengan imbal hasil 1,98%. Perusahaan juga mengumumkan dividen untuk beberapa seri saham preferennya, dengan pembayaran dijadwalkan pada pertengahan Februari 2026.

feed.title: MANNATECH INC SEC 10-Q Report
feed.summary: Mannatech Inc. released its Q1 2025 Form 10-Q report, detailing a decline in key financial metrics and operational challenges, particularly in Asia. Net sales decreased by 9.6% to $26.6 million, and the company reported a net loss of $1.5 million. The report indicates decreased active associates and product sales, prompting plans for revenue growth, margin improvement, and cost control.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Declares Quarterly Dividend, Extending Streak
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share, continuing its 135-year dividend history and 69 years of dividend increases. This announcement reinforces P&G's reputation as a reliable income stock for investors. While a recent analyst rating suggests a "Buy" with a $158.00 price target, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark views PG as "Neutral," citing strong financial performance offset by bearish technical indicators and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Google stock (GOOG) rises after-hours on Apple’s Gemini-Siri deal as earnings near
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOG) Class C shares rose 1.1% in after-hours trading following news of Apple's plan to integrate Google's Gemini AI models into Siri and other AI features. This partnership is seen as a significant win for Alphabet in the generative AI space, especially as the company approaches its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings release on February 4th. Investors are closely watching how AI advancements will impact revenue and costs, and whether this high-profile deal will boost Gemini usage and Google Cloud demand.

feed.title: ResMed Chairman Emeritus Peter Farrell Sells 2,000 Shares Under Trading Plan
feed.summary: ResMed Chairman Emeritus Peter C. Farrell sold 2,000 shares of ResMed common stock on January 7, 2026, for $248.83 per share under a pre-arranged trading plan. Despite the sale, he retains a significant stake of 66,773 shares in the company. ResMed (AU:RMD) is a medical technology company specializing in sleep-disordered breathing and chronic respiratory conditions.

feed.title: ResMed CEO Michael Farrell Exercises Options and Sells Shares Under 10b5-1 Plan
feed.summary: ResMed CEO Michael Farrell recently exercised stock options to acquire 4,991 shares at $146.34 per share and subsequently sold them for approximately $248.46 per share under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Farrell retains a significant stake in the company, holding 466,223 direct shares and additional indirect holdings. ResMed is a medical technology company specializing in devices and software for sleep apnea and respiratory conditions, with its stock currently rated as a Buy by analysts.

feed.title: Pinnacle CEO Kevin Blair and Executive Leaders Ring Opening Bell at New York Stock Exchange
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners President and CEO Kevin Blair, along with his executive team, rang the New York Stock Exchange opening bell to celebrate the closing of the firm's merger with Synovus Financial Corp. and its new NYSE listing. The combined $117.2 billion asset regional bank will continue to operate Pinnacle and Synovus brands independently until early 2027, aiming to be America's most trusted bank. This event highlights Pinnacle's growth and its strong position as the largest bank headquartered in Tennessee and Georgia, with a significant presence across the Southeast and Atlantic Coast.

feed.title: Broadcom issues $4.5 billion in senior notes, plans debt redemption
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. has announced the issuance of $4.5 billion in senior notes across four series, with interest rates ranging from 4.300% to 5.700% and maturities between 2031 and 2056. The company plans to use these proceeds for general corporate purposes and to redeem several existing senior notes, including those issued by its subsidiary VMware LLC. This move comes as Broadcom reports a 24% year-over-year revenue increase for fiscal year 2025, driven by a 65% expansion in AI semiconductor revenue.

feed.title: LPL, Ameriprise report online attacks on clients’ accounts, data to Maine.
feed.summary: LPL Financial and Ameriprise Financial Services have reported separate incidents of online attacks affecting client accounts and data. LPL experienced a "pump-and-dump" trading scheme impacting 53 clients, while an Ameriprise financial advisor fell victim to a phishing scam, potentially exposing data for 598 clients. Both firms have notified Maine's Attorney General and are investigating the incidents.

feed.title: Broadcom Announces $4.5 Billion Senior Notes Offering
feed.summary: Broadcom has announced a $4.5 billion senior notes offering to be used for general corporate purposes and debt repayment. In conjunction with this, Broadcom and its VMware subsidiary will redeem approximately $4 billion of existing notes in early 2026, aiming to retire nearer-term issues and extend the overall debt maturity profile. Analysts currently rate AVGO as a Buy, with TipRanks' AI Analyst giving it an Outperform based on strong financial performance and positive sentiment from growth in AI semiconductors and software.

feed.title: Clorox Announces February 3 Webcast of Second-Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results
feed.summary: The Clorox Company announced a webcast for its second-quarter fiscal year 2026 results scheduled for February 3, 2026. A press release and prepared remarks will be posted at 1:15 p.m. PT / 4:15 p.m. ET, followed by a live Q&A audio webcast with Chair and CEO Linda Rendle and Chief Financial Officer Luc Bellet at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET. Links to these resources will be available on the Clorox investor relations website.

feed.title: 10 High Risk Dividend Stocks To Avoid
feed.summary: This article identifies 10 high-risk dividend stocks to avoid, all of which have "F" Dividend Risk Scores and payout ratios exceeding 100%, indicating an inability to sustain their current dividend payouts. The list, sorted by payout ratio, provides a brief overview of each company's recent financial performance and the reasons for its high-risk classification. Income investors are advised to be cautious with these stocks to prevent potential dividend cuts or eliminations.

feed.title: Hormel Foods To Hold 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders in person on January 27, 2026, at 6 p.m. CST in Austin, Minnesota. Stockholders must present photo identification and proof of ownership to attend, with an expedited check-in process available for those who pre-register by January 22, 2026. A question-and-answer session will follow the business portion, with questions required to be submitted in advance.

feed.title: Missile Defense awards $151B SHIELD deal for homeland protection
feed.summary: HII's Mission Technologies division has been awarded a Missile Defense Agency SHIELD indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract with a ceiling of $151 billion. This contract opens opportunities for HII in directed energy, command-and-control integration, data and cyber operations, microelectronics, spectrum management, training, logistics, and sustainment. The award reinforces HII's commitment to national security and homeland defense, leveraging its expertise in defense technology.

feed.title: SPAM Museum gift boxes await Hormel stockholders after 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Hormel Foods will host its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders in person on January 27, 2026, at Austin High School in Austin, Minnesota. Stockholders of record as of November 28, 2025, are eligible to attend, with pre-registration available for expedited check-in. Additionally, eligible stockholders can pick up gift boxes at the SPAM Museum from January 28-31, 2026, while supplies last, requiring proof of ownership.

feed.title: KLA Corp. initiated with an Outperform at Bernstein
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon initiated coverage of KLA Corp. (KLAC) with an Outperform rating and a $1,700 price target, expecting the company to achieve low double-digit revenue growth and mid double-digit earnings growth over the next several years. Despite an elevated valuation, KLA merits a premium due to its strong structural growth drivers, competitive standing with reduced China replacement risk, and appealing financial model. This initiation follows several other analysts recently raising their price targets for KLAC.

feed.title: Charles River Labs to acquire K.F. Cambodia and PathoQuest SAS By Investing.com
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. announced its plans to acquire K.F. (Cambodia) Ltd. for approximately $510 million and exercise its option to purchase the remaining 79% stake in PathoQuest SAS for about $60 million. These acquisitions are set to strengthen Charles River’s non-human primate supply chain and enhance its biologics testing capabilities with next-generation sequencing solutions. The company also reported improving demand trends, with shares trading near a 52-week high, and a leadership transition plan for 2026.

feed.title: Destination XL holiday sales drop 5.8% amid retail challenges By Investing.com
feed.summary: Destination XL Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:DXLG) reported a 5.8% decrease in comparable sales for the nine-week holiday period ending January 3, 2026, totaling $89.9 million. This decline reflects a challenging retail environment, particularly in stores, despite strategic promotions in their direct business. The company is set to merge with FullBeauty in the first half of fiscal 2026, a transaction expected to create a $1.2 billion retailer with approximately $25 million in cost synergies.

feed.title: Movado group SVP Kennedy sells $26948 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Michelle Kennedy, SVP of Human Resources at Movado Group Inc, sold 1,290 shares of common stock for $26,948 on December 9, 2025, and acquired 84 shares on January 2, 2026, through phantom stock unit conversion. This comes as Movado Group reported third-quarter adjusted EPS of $0.45, missing analyst expectations, though revenue slightly exceeded forecasts at $186.1 million. Northland has initiated coverage with an Outperform rating and a $30 price target, suggesting current tariff situations may offer a favorable entry point.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (COP) Price Target Lowered by $6
feed.summary: Piper Sandler analyst Ryan Todd reduced the price target for ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) from $115 to $109, while maintaining an ‘Overweight’ rating, still indicating an approximate 12% upside. Despite a bearish crude oil outlook for 2026, the oil refining market is expected to improve, driven by tighter supply/demand dynamics. The company stands to benefit from potential recoveries of up to $12 billion from Venezuela and boasts an annual dividend yield of 3.33%.

feed.title: 6M electric customers get peek as FirstEnergy details 2025 results
feed.summary: FirstEnergy (NYSE: FE) announced it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results after market close on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. Management will discuss these results during a conference call with financial analysts at 9:00 a.m. EST on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, with a live webcast and presentation slides available for investors. The company serves over 6 million customers across several states and operates approximately 24,000 miles of transmission lines.

feed.title: Salesforce makes revamped Slackbot generally available
feed.summary: Salesforce has officially launched a significantly enhanced version of Slackbot, its AI assistant embedded in Slack, after first previewing it at Dreamforce 2025. This revamped Slackbot expands beyond simple notifications to automate a wide range of tasks, including extracting specific data from documents, summarizing information across multiple files, and integrating with external applications like Google Drive and Salesforce CRM. Powered by Anthropic's Claude series of large language models, the tool also supports content generation, scheduling, and will eventually integrate with Salesforce's Agentforce and third-party AI agents, functioning as a "single pane of glass" for various AI tasks.

feed.title: Hanmi Financial Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings and Conference Call Date
feed.summary: Hanmi Financial Corporation is set to release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss these results. Interested investors and professionals can access the live call or listen to a webcast replay on Hanmi's website.

feed.title: A Look At Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Valuation After BofA Downgrade On AI Demand And Development Concerns
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded Digital Realty Trust (DLR) from Buy to Neutral due to concerns about slower AI-related demand capture and development concentration in less exposed markets. Despite the downgrade, Simply Wall St's narrative suggests DLR is 20.2% undervalued with a fair value of $197.78, emphasizing its contracted backlog and development pipeline. However, the article also notes that DLR's current P/E of 39.9x is higher than its peers and the sector average, indicating potential valuation risk.

feed.title: INVO Fertility to Participate in the Lytham Partners 2026 Investor Healthcare Summit on January 15, 2026
feed.summary: INVO Fertility, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVF) announced its participation in the virtual Lytham Partners 2026 Investor Healthcare Summit on January 15, 2026, at 3:00 p.m. ET. The company, focused on expanding access to assisted reproductive technology, will host a webcast fireside chat. A replay of the webcast will be available via the conference home page.

feed.title: Park Aerospace reports Q3 results with 20% YoY revenue growth By Investing.com
feed.summary: Park Aerospace Corp. (NYSE:PKE) reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, surpassing last year's performance with a 20% year-over-year increase in revenue, reaching $17.33 million. Adjusted earnings per share rose to $0.15 from $0.08, and net earnings nearly doubled to $2.95 million. Despite the positive financial report, the company's shares experienced a slight decline of 1% in after-hours trading.

feed.title: Regions Financial's longtime CFO announces his retirement
feed.summary: David Turner, the CFO of Regions Financial for 15 years, is retiring at the end of March 2026. He will be succeeded by Anil Chadha, the company's current controller, who has worked closely with Turner for 15 years. Turner played a key role in the bank's recovery post-financial crisis, leading to 13 consecutive annual profits.

feed.title: Farmers National Banc reminds shareholders to vote on Middlefield merger
feed.summary: Farmers National Banc Corp. (NASDAQ:FMNB) has reminded its shareholders to vote on the proposed merger with Middlefield Banc Corp. (NASDAQ:MBCN) before the virtual shareholder meeting on February 10, 2026. The Board of Directors recommends a vote in favor of the merger, which aims to strengthen Farmers' market position and expand its geographic footprint. FMNB is currently considered undervalued based on InvestingPro data, has maintained dividend payments for 32 consecutive years, and has been profitable over the last twelve months.

feed.title: UPS To Release Fourth-Quarter 2025 Results On Tuesday, January 27, 2026
feed.summary: United Parcel Service (NYSE:UPS) announced that it will release its 2025 fourth-quarter results on January 27, 2026, at approximately 6:00 a.m. E.T. Following the release, CEO Carol Tomé and CFO Brian Dykes will host an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET, accessible via live webcast on the UPS Investor Relations page. The webcast audio will remain available on the website for a limited period after the call.

feed.title: EOG Resources Schedules Conference Call and Webcast of Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results for February 25, 2026
feed.summary: EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE: EOG) has scheduled a conference call and webcast to discuss its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. This event will take place on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, at 9 a.m. Central time. Interested parties can access a live webcast and a replay for one year via the Investors/Events & Presentations page on the company's website.

feed.title: Kroger makes several leadership changes
feed.summary: Kroger has announced several new leadership appointments across its retail divisions and the upcoming retirements of two long-serving senior leaders. Victor Smith is promoted to senior vice president of Retail Divisions, Monica Garnes will lead the Atlanta Division, Ken DeLuca is appointed president of the Fry’s Division, and Kendra Doyel will head the Ralphs Division. Tom Schwilke and Colleen Juergensen are retiring after extensive careers with the company.

feed.title: Jabil Announces Annual Meeting of Stockholders
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) announced its Annual Meeting of Stockholders will be held virtually on January 22, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EST. Stockholders registered by November 28, 2025, can attend, vote, and ask questions through an online platform, with a live audio webcast available on Jabil's Investor Relations website. The company also provides information on its comprehensive engineering, supply chain, and manufacturing solutions.

feed.title: Time Names Ford The Most Iconic Company In America
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has been recognized by Time magazine and Statista as the most iconic American company, topping a list of 250 U.S. companies for its significant impact on culture, business, and daily life. The distinction highlights Ford's pioneering role in manufacturing with the assembly line and its continued influence through its dominant market presence in trucks and commercial vehicles, along with investments in electric vehicles. General Motors also ranked highly, placing seventh overall, acknowledging its long-standing presence and ongoing contributions to the American auto industry.

feed.title: Boston Scientific plans expansion in Maple Grove
feed.summary: Boston Scientific plans to expand its presence in Maple Grove with a new four-story, 300,000-square-foot lab and office facility, to be named the Minnesota Science and Technology Center. The project received planning commission approval and awaits final city council approval on January 20th. This expansion will add significant office and lab space, supporting the growth of Boston Scientific's Cardiovascular businesses and further solidifying its position as Maple Grove's largest employer.

feed.title: Boeing Is Winning With The 737 MAX (NYSE:BA)
feed.summary: Boeing is demonstrating strong commercial momentum, highlighted by a record 145-aircraft order from Alaska Airlines, which significantly boosts the 737 MAX 10 backlog. The company is actively ramping up 737 MAX production, with 97% of its target 84 units per month already sold out. The author maintains a bullish outlook on Boeing's long-term prospects, attributing it to disciplined production, a focus on safety, and increasing free cash flow.

feed.title: EPR Properties Fourth Quarter and Year End 2025 Earnings Conference Call Scheduled for February 26, 2026
feed.summary: EPR Properties announced its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 financial results will be released after market close on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET. A conference call to discuss these results will be hosted by management on Thursday, February 26, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be webcast and accessible via the Investor Center section of EPR Properties' website.

feed.title: Broadcom Inc. Enters $4.5 Billion Senior Notes Agreement
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. announced on January 6, 2026, that it has entered into a $4.5 billion senior notes issuance agreement. The proceeds from these notes will be utilized for general corporate purposes and to repay existing debt. Additionally, the company has issued redemption notices for $3.9 billion of its current outstanding notes.

feed.title: Bernstein Says AI Competition Fears Around Broadcom (AVGO) Are Overblown
feed.summary: Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon reiterated an Outperform rating on Broadcom (AVGO), dismissing fears about AI competition. The firm believes Broadcom's leadership in AI ASICs, coupled with unmatched innovation and execution, makes these concerns overblown. Through a meeting with company leadership, Bernstein gained conviction that Broadcom's technological, scale, and supply chain advantages will allow it to maintain its dominant position in the AI ASIC space.

feed.title: Netflix Stock Pops on Report It Might Amend Warner Bros Bid to All Cash
feed.summary: Netflix stock rose 1% after a report indicated the company is considering an all-cash offer for Warner Bros. Discovery. This potential move could intensify the bidding war for Warner Bros., as Netflix has been in competition with Paramount Skydance.

feed.title: Firefly Aerospace stock slides nearly 9% as Alpha Block II upgrade puts Flight 7 launch in focus (FLY)
feed.summary: Firefly Aerospace (FLY) stock dropped nearly 9% following the announcement of its Alpha "Block II" rocket upgrade and the upcoming Flight 7 launch. This mission is crucial for testing Block II subsystems in "shadow mode" to establish flight heritage, while the company aims to improve reliability and streamline production. Investors are closely watching Flight 7 results as upgrades carry inherent risks that could impact future launch schedules and investor sentiment.

feed.title: PARK AEROSPACE CORP SEC 10-Q Report
feed.summary: Park Aerospace Corp (PKE) has released its Form 10-Q report for Q3 fiscal year 2025, highlighting significant financial growth and operational resilience. The company reported increased net sales and earnings due to higher demand in space, commercial, and military markets, despite supply chain issues and inflationary pressures. Park Aerospace also noted strategic partnerships and operational efficiency, indicating a positive future outlook.

feed.title: Developer behind Publix, Kroger to discuss Mid City Mall redevelopment plans
feed.summary: A representative from Branch Properties, a real estate firm known for working with grocery chains like Publix and Kroger, will present redevelopment plans for Louisville's Mid City Mall later this month. This comes as several businesses in the mall, including the Baxter Avenue Theatre and ValuMarket, have announced closures amid uncertainty about the property's future. The plans are expected to be discussed at the Highlands Commerce Guild's January meeting, though no official filings have been made with the city's Office of Planning yet.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc.: The Hidden Engine Powering the AI Chip Boom
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. is a critical supplier of semiconductor manufacturing equipment, enabling the AI and high-performance computing boom through its advanced process tools for deposition, etch, inspection, and packaging. The company's comprehensive product portfolio is essential for scaling compute performance and memory density, making it a pivotal player in the semiconductor ecosystem, despite facing cyclical and geopolitical risks. Its stock, AMAT, is viewed as a leveraged bet on the long-term demand for compute and memory, driven by AI, cloud, and connected devices.

feed.title: AT&T pays $1.018B for wireless spectrum, triggering $10.25 payout
feed.summary: Array Digital Infrastructure has successfully closed the sale of a portion of its retained spectrum licenses to AT&T for $1.018 billion. Following this sale, Array's Board of Directors declared a special cash dividend of $10.25 per common share, payable on February 2, 2026, to shareholders of record on January 23, 2026. This transaction is part of Array's strategy to monetize spectrum not included in a previous sale and return value to shareholders.

feed.title: Seagate Technology to Report Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on January 27, 2026
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings plc (NASDAQ: STX) will announce its fiscal second quarter 2026 financial results after the U.S. market closes on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. A conference call for the investment community will follow at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET to discuss these results. Interested parties can access the live audio webcast on Seagate’s Investor Relations website.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Wednesday, February 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call on Thursday, February 12, 2026, to discuss these results, providing details for both domestic and international participation as well as a live internet broadcast. Rollins, Inc. is a global consumer and commercial services company specializing in pest control through various brands.

feed.title: MasterBrand to Announce Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results on February 10
feed.summary: MasterBrand, Inc. (NYSE: MBC), a leading North American residential cabinet manufacturer, will release its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results on Tuesday, February 10, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a live conference call and webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results and business outlook. A replay of the call will be available afterward for those unable to attend live.

feed.title: GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP Q4 2025 Earnings Preview: Recent $GS Insider Trading, Hedge Fund Activity, and More
feed.summary: This article previews Goldman Sachs Group's (GS) Q4 2025 earnings, expected on January 15th, with analysts forecasting $14.2 billion in revenue and $12.00 EPS. It details recent insider trading activity, showing significant insider sales, alongside hedge fund movements, revealing both additions and removals of GS stock by institutional investors. The report also covers congressional trading, analyst ratings, and price targets for GS.

feed.title: Farmers National Banc Corp. Reminds Shareholders to Vote on Proposed Merger with Middlefield Banc Corp.
feed.summary: Farmers National Banc Corp. is urging its shareholders to vote FOR the proposed merger with Middlefield Banc Corp. ahead of a virtual shareholder meeting on February 10, 2026. The company highlights the merger as a strategic move to enhance long-term shareholder value by expanding its market position and geographic footprint. Shareholders are encouraged to review provided materials and vote by February 9, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time.
